message:
docs: add kylezantos testimonial, fix avatar endpoints

- Add testimonial about running to computer after daycare
- Switch unavatar.io from /twitter/ to /x/ endpoint (returns 200 vs 301)

files.patch:
@@ -1,4 +1,9 @@
 [
+  {
+    "quote": "Today was one of those days that I sort of ran to my computer after dropping off my toddler at daycare. Why? Because I got part-way through setting up @clawdbot last night and it's a portal to a new reality.",
+    "author": "kylezantos",
+    "url": "https://x.com/kylezantos/status/2011149783218704803"
+  },
   {
     "quote": "Me reading about @clawdbot: 'this looks complicated' 😅 me 30 mins later: controlling Gmail, Calendar, WordPress, Hetzner from Telegram like a boss. Smooth as single malt.",
     "author": "Abhay08",
